code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut xs: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut value = 0

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if in_num
        xs = list.push(xs, value * sign)
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
        value = 0
      end
    else if b == 45
      sign = -1
      in_num = true
    else if b == 43
      in_num = true
    else
      value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  xs = list.push(xs, value * sign)
end

mut ys: List<Int> = []
for x in xs
  if not list.contains(ys, x)
    ys = list.push(ys, x)
  end
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
for x in ys
  mut new_sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for v in sorted
    if not inserted and x < v
      new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, v)
  end
  if not inserted
    new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
  end
  sorted = new_sorted
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for v in sorted
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
end
println(out)
